assets.recommendedUse: Primary app icon, favicon source, small brand marks
Hero brand mark, Open Graph image, premium or polished brand surfaces
Light backgrounds when a monochrome mark is needed
Hero phone mockup or product preview

notes: Keep product imagery visible in the first viewport on desktop.
On mobile, prioritize headline, CTA, and a cropped product preview without hiding the primary action.
Use the blue gradient logo for social previews unless a custom Open Graph image is created.
